name: single_span_height_v2
_doc: Same canonical healthy aorta as single_baseline_v2.json, but parametrised by arch_span_mm + arch_height_mm directly instead of arch_R_c + arch_angle_deg. cli_v2._resolve_arch_params converts them to R_c=40.4 mm, angle=180° via the closed-form inverse before invoking Blender. Use this style when you want to dial in 'arch is 80 mm wide and 40 mm tall' directly.
